title: 2024924Wet 87578J
summary:
Main
• VLCC Market Strengthens on the Back of Increasing Inquiry as Hopes for a Winter Recovery Resurface - The recovery of the VLCC (Very Large Crude Carrier) market gained momentum starting in early September, with a notable firming by the end of the third week, driven by a surge in enquiries. The improvement in rates is largely due to vessel owners managing to finally push rates above previous levels, bolstered by a limited number of such owners controlling much of the available tonnage for early-month cargoes. Adverse weather in China and India, including terminal delays caused by monsoon conditions, further tightened vessel supply.
